name: Wood Desk with Drawers Natural Wood - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Give your study nook a stylish upgrade with this Wood Desk with Drawers from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This light brown desk gives your room a neat, decorative look with its sleek silhouette, distinctive scalloped legs, and three-sided wooden bars at the base. It has a rectangular desktop that provides a perfect platform for your laptop and accessories, along with two file drawers with metal pulls for extra organization and storage.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
